message:
feat(fcp-cli): add egress policy explain CLI (bd-39j0)

Adds `fcp net explain --url <URL> --manifest-path <path>` command
for debugging NetworkConstraints egress policy decisions.

Features:
- Dry-run evaluation using fcp-sandbox EgressGuard
- Human-readable and JSON output formats
- Suggests minimal allowlist changes when blocked
- Validates SNI and redirect count limits

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
